caption:
KeyGo needed a car rental platform that could handle fleet display, bookings, and Mauritian payment methods — all in one site.

We delivered it in 5 days.

Fleet management display. Booking enquiry flow. MCB Juice & my.t money payment info. Full mobile optimisation.

This is what the Grand Baie package delivers. Custom, multi-page, built for conversion. 🚗

→ bienzoli.com
